input.tenant_message: There's a dripping faucet in the kitchen that's been going on for maybe a month. It drips from the spout even when it's fully turned off — maybe once every few seconds. I put a bowl under it for now. It's not a flood or anything but I wanted to report it. It keeps me up at night sometimes when the apartment is quiet.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a non-urgent visit to replace the worn cartridge or washers in the kitchen faucet — a dripping faucet from a closed tap typically indicates a failed internal seal and is a straightforward repair. Address within 2 weeks to prevent unnecessary water waste.
